title: lespedeza × maruyamana
intro: Lespedeza × maruyamana, also known as Maruyama's Lespedeza, is a hybrid plant species within the Fabaceae family, specifically a cross between Lespedeza bicolor and Lespedeza cyrtobasis. The plant has been studied for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce swelling and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Lespedeza × maruyamana include potential anti-cancer and anti-diabetic effects, as well as support for cardiovascular health. Traditional herbal preparations include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness the plant's medicinal properties.
